title: How Salesforce Is Helping Reskill the Tech Workforce of Today
author: Ariel Kelman

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: The future of work is evolving faster than ever. From the rise of AI agents to the demand for cloud and AI-powered tools, organizations need skilled professionals who can adapt, innovate, and lead the way forward. At Salesforce, we believe reskilling and upskilling aren’t just nice-to-haves, they’re essential to empowering today’s workforce and creating opportunities for tomorrow. Salesforce helps people everywhere build the skills they need for the future — through free learning, community-led webinars, hackathons, workforce development partnerships, and programs that open doors to new opportunities. Together, these initiatives create pathways for anyone, anywhere to learn, grow, and succeed.

sections.heading: Trailhead and Agentblazer Status
sections.text: At the heart of reskilling with Salesforce isTrailhead— Salesforce’s free, online learning platform that helps millions worldwide build Salesforce, AI, and professional skills. With guided learning trails and hands-on projects, anyone can start or advance their career. Trailblazers cut through the AI hype to bring real value to their customers and companies. They constantly invest in developing their AI and Agentforce skills to create a future where humans and agents work together. Agentblazer Statusrecognizes real-world AI and Agentforce skills through three levels of guided trails. Earning an Agentblazer Status proves your expertise, makes you stand out to current and potential employers, and opens doors to new opportunities. This learning journey starts with Champion Status, advances to Innovator Status, and culminates in Legend Status, recognizing deep AI and Agentforce expertise, as well as hands-on experience.

sections.heading: Free Events That Open Doors
sections.text: We’re committed to making learning accessible to everyone. That’s why we hostfree global eventswhere learners can explore the latest innovations, sharpen their skills, and connect with peers. From hands-on workshops to live demos, these events provide practical opportunities that turn curiosity into career growth. In addition to ongoing virtual events, we also announcedAI for All— a free, in-person training designed to help anyone learn the foundations of artificial intelligence. With instructor-led training, learn from an expert with hands on exercises that break down core concepts, give best practices and real-world use cases. Our offerings come in virtual bite sizelearning workshops(60-120 mins) to a 3-day class at our San Francisco and London AI Centers. As part of AI for All, learners can now earn theSalesforce Certified Agentforce Specialistcertification at no cost through Dec 31, 2025. To prepare, learners can access freeTrailmixesandCertification Prep Modulestailored to each exam. This initiative ensures that anyone, anywhere, can build the skills and credibility needed to thrive in an AI-powered economy

sections.heading: Hackathons That Spark Innovation
sections.text: Hackathons aren’t just about code—they’re a launchpad for creativity, collaboration, and solving real-world problems. Our recentAgentforce Virtual Hackathonis a perfect example: Open to everyone—from seasoned developers to learners just getting started with Agentforce.Hands-on with tools likeAgentforce DX,Prompt Builder,Tableau Next,Data Cloud, andSlack, giving participants real-world AI skills.Supported by resources likeAgentforce Decoded, theDeveloper Center, andAgentforce NOW Workshops. Hackathons like this give Trailblazers and Agentblazers a chance to apply skills, build portfolios, gain recognition, and connect with peers—all while accelerating their career growth.

sections.heading: Workforce Partner Program
sections.text: Salesforce partners with 140+ leadingworkforce development organizationsworldwide to deliver hands-on training, mentorship, and job placement opportunities—expanding access to career pathways in tech, especially for those traditionally underrepresented in the industry. Through the Trailblazer Workforce Partner program, these organizations have trained over 95,000 individuals this year across career tracks including Administrator, Developer, Architect and Consultant roles, with an emphasis on embedding AI and Agentforce into their curriculum. Organizations likePer Scholas,SmartBridge, andBlue Road Academyguide learners in hands-on capstone projects using prompt builders and agents to create solutions for Sales or Service Teams. These workforce partners are shaping the next generation of Trailblazers through hands-on learning, community engagement, and mentorship — transforming careers for the future of work. Read more about their success storieshere.

sections.heading: Fundamentals: Guided Webinars for Skills for the Future
sections.text: Salesforce Fundamentalsis a free series of 45-90 minute webinars that empower learners to develop Salesforce skills and product awareness by combining real-world examples and hands-onTrailheadlearning. The newest addition to the Salesforce Fundamentals catalog was an inspiring example of the power of the Trailblazer Community and reskilling in action. Salesforce Fundamentals: For the Community, by the Community was co-hosted by 9 Community Conference organizers in India. With over 13,000 registrations, the session introduced Salesforce, Trailhead, and AI Fundamentals while highlighting three key messages: Trailhead is the best place to start your Salesforce journeyAI skills are essential for the future of workLearning is lifelong—a journey to keep growing and evolving Participant feedback was overwhelmingly positive, with learners calling it“well-structured and informative, interactive, and easy to follow—even for beginners.” This is the power of the Trailblazer Community: when people come together to share knowledge, support one another, and create opportunities for the next generation of tech leaders.

sections.heading: Salesforce Military
sections.text: Salesforce Militaryis a free training and career readiness program designed to bridge the gap between military service and corporate success with no degree, prior experience, or commitment required. Today, the program supports a growing community of over 86,000 veterans and military spouses across the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, and New Zealand. Members gain access to: Free Salesforce certifications and Trailhead Academy classesAI upskillingand career readiness trainingMentorship from Veteran Allies, Vetforce, and Military Community LeadersPartnerships withHire Heroes USAandHiring Our HeroesNetworking opportunities, including the quarterly Salesforce Military Exchange and marqueeSalesforce events By enabling veterans and military spouses to successfully transition into the tech industry, Salesforce Military strengthens the ecosystem and creates a true (sales)force multiplier.

sections.heading: Building Skills for the Future
sections.text: We believe reskilling starts with us — taking care of our own employees first.Career Connectis an AI-powered tool for all full-time Salesforce employees that recommends diverse career paths, opportunities, and learning programs tailored to each individual. By analyzing skills, experience, and career goals, Career Connect helps employees discover new roles while also identifying the skills they need to grow. At Salesforce, reskilling isn’t just about tools, it’s about people. By combining opportunities for learning, we’re helping create a more inclusive, skilled, and future-ready workforce. Because the future of work belongs to all of us—and together, we’re building it today.

raw_html:
The future of work is evolving faster than ever. From the rise of AI agents to the demand for cloud and AI-powered tools, organizations need skilled professionals who can adapt, innovate, and lead the way forward. At Salesforce, we believe reskilling and upskilling aren’t just nice-to-haves, they’re essential to empowering today’s workforce and creating opportunities for tomorrow.

Salesforce helps people everywhere build the skills they need for the future — through free learning, community-led webinars, hackathons, workforce development partnerships, and programs that open doors to new opportunities. Together, these initiatives create pathways for anyone, anywhere to learn, grow, and succeed.

Trailhead and Agentblazer Status

At the heart of reskilling with Salesforce is Trailhead — Salesforce’s free, online learning platform that helps millions worldwide build Salesforce, AI, and professional skills. With guided learning trails and hands-on projects, anyone can start or advance their career.

Trailblazers cut through the AI hype to bring real value to their customers and companies. They constantly invest in developing their AI and Agentforce skills to create a future where humans and agents work together. 

Agentblazer Status recognizes real-world AI and Agentforce skills through three levels of guided trails. Earning an Agentblazer Status proves your expertise, makes you stand out to current and potential employers, and opens doors to new opportunities. This learning journey starts with Champion Status, advances to Innovator Status, and culminates in Legend Status, recognizing deep AI and Agentforce expertise, as well as hands-on experience. 

Free Events That Open Doors

We’re committed to making learning accessible to everyone. That’s why we host free global events where learners can explore the latest innovations, sharpen their skills, and connect with peers. From hands-on workshops to live demos, these events provide practical opportunities that turn curiosity into career growth.

In addition to ongoing virtual events, we also announced AI for All — a free, in-person training designed to help anyone learn the foundations of artificial intelligence. With instructor-led training, learn from an expert with hands on exercises that break down core concepts, give best practices and real-world use cases. Our offerings come in virtual bite size learning workshops (60-120 mins) to a 3-day class at our San Francisco and London AI Centers. 

As part of AI for All, learners can now earn the Salesforce Certified Agentforce Specialist certification at no cost through Dec 31, 2025.

To prepare, learners can access free Trailmixes and Certification Prep Modules tailored to each exam. This initiative ensures that anyone, anywhere, can build the skills and credibility needed to thrive in an AI-powered economy

Hackathons That Spark Innovation

Hackathons aren’t just about code—they’re a launchpad for creativity, collaboration, and solving real-world problems. Our recent Agentforce Virtual Hackathon is a perfect example:

  • Open to everyone—from seasoned developers to learners just getting started with Agentforce.
  • Hands-on with tools like Agentforce DX, Prompt Builder, Tableau Next, Data Cloud, and Slack, giving participants real-world AI skills.
  • Supported by resources like Agentforce Decoded, the Developer Center, and Agentforce NOW Workshops.

Hackathons like this give Trailblazers and Agentblazers a chance to apply skills, build portfolios, gain recognition, and connect with peers—all while accelerating their career growth.

Workforce Partner Program

Salesforce partners with 140+ leading workforce development organizations worldwide to deliver hands-on training, mentorship, and job placement opportunities—expanding access to career pathways in tech, especially for those traditionally underrepresented in the industry.

Through the Trailblazer Workforce Partner program, these organizations have trained over 95,000 individuals this year across career tracks including Administrator, Developer, Architect and Consultant roles, with an emphasis on embedding AI and Agentforce into their curriculum. Organizations like Per Scholas, SmartBridge, and Blue Road Academy guide learners in hands-on capstone projects using prompt builders and agents to create solutions for Sales or Service Teams.

These workforce partners are shaping the next generation of Trailblazers through hands-on learning, community engagement, and mentorship — transforming careers for the future of work. Read more about their success stories here. 

Fundamentals: Guided Webinars for Skills for the Future 

Salesforce Fundamentals is a free series of 45-90 minute webinars that empower learners to develop Salesforce skills and product awareness by combining real-world examples and hands-on Trailhead learning. The newest addition to the Salesforce Fundamentals catalog was an inspiring example of the power of the Trailblazer Community and reskilling in action.

Salesforce Fundamentals: For the Community, by the Community was co-hosted by 9 Community Conference organizers in India. With over 13,000 registrations, the session introduced Salesforce, Trailhead, and AI Fundamentals while highlighting three key messages:

  • Trailhead is the best place to start your Salesforce journey
  • AI skills are essential for the future of work
  • Learning is lifelong—a journey to keep growing and evolving

Participant feedback was overwhelmingly positive, with learners calling it “well-structured and informative, interactive, and easy to follow—even for beginners.”

This is the power of the Trailblazer Community: when people come together to share knowledge, support one another, and create opportunities for the next generation of tech leaders.

Salesforce Military

Salesforce Military is a free training and career readiness program designed to bridge the gap between military service and corporate success with no degree, prior experience, or commitment required.

Today, the program supports a growing community of over 86,000 veterans and military spouses across the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, and New Zealand. Members gain access to:

  • Free Salesforce certifications and Trailhead Academy classes
  • AI upskilling and career readiness training
  • Mentorship from Veteran Allies, Vetforce, and Military Community Leaders
  • Partnerships with Hire Heroes USA and Hiring Our Heroes
  • Networking opportunities, including the quarterly Salesforce Military Exchange and marquee Salesforce events

By enabling veterans and military spouses to successfully transition into the tech industry, Salesforce Military strengthens the ecosystem and creates a true (sales)force multiplier.

Building Skills for the Future

We believe reskilling starts with us — taking care of our own employees first. Career Connect is an AI-powered tool for all full-time Salesforce employees that recommends diverse career paths, opportunities, and learning programs tailored to each individual. By analyzing skills, experience, and career goals, Career Connect helps employees discover new roles while also identifying the skills they need to grow.

At Salesforce, reskilling isn’t just about tools, it’s about people. By combining opportunities for learning, we’re helping create a more inclusive, skilled, and future-ready workforce.

Because the future of work belongs to all of us—and together, we’re building it today.
